# flashduty_teams (Data Source)

Use this data source to get a list of Flashduty teams.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all teams
data "flashduty_teams" "all" {}

# Output all team names
output "all_team_names" {
  value = [for team in data.flashduty_teams.all.teams : team.team_name]
}

# Find a specific team by name using a local
locals {
  sre_team = [for team in data.flashduty_teams.all.teams : team if team.team_name == "SRE Team"][0]
}

output "sre_team_id" {
  value = local.sre_team.team_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `query` (String) Search query to filter teams by name or description.

### Read-Only

- `teams` (Attributes List) The list of teams. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams))

<a id="nestedatt--teams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the team.
- `team_id` (Number) The ID of the team.
- `team_name` (String) The name of the team.
